title: Forsetti Agentic Edition Release Entry
description: Schema for changelog and release entries in the Forsetti Agentic Edition governance workflow.

version_impact.description: The impact this change has on the project version.

affected_area.description: The area of the project affected by this change.

breaking_change.description: Whether this change breaks backward compatibility.

task_reference.description: Reference to the task contract that produced this change.

approval_class.description: Level of approval applied to this change.

migration_note.description: Migration instructions for consumers. Required when breaking_change is true.

documentation_impact.description: Description of how documentation is affected by this change.
